introSection: Wild Mouse was a B. A. Schiff & Associates steel wild mouse roller coaster located at West Point Park in West Point, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride was purchased new, and was sold off in parts when the park closed. It is thought to have been one of the smaller Schiff Wild Mouse models, based on aerial photos.
fullText: Wild Mouse was a B. A. Schiff & Associates steel wild mouse roller coaster located at West Point Park in West Point, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride was purchased new, and was sold off in parts when the park closed. It is thought to have been one of the smaller Schiff Wild Mouse models, based on aerial photos.
